plan.summary: Extract duplicated SetProperty<T>/OnPropertyChanged into shared BindableBase, remove per-file copies from 83 ViewModels

patterns.description: ViewModel with one private bool SetProperty<T> using Equals() or EqualityComparer, private void OnPropertyChanged, implements INotifyPropertyChanged directly, public event PropertyChangedEventHandler
patterns.transformation: Change base class from INotifyPropertyChanged to BindableBase. Remove: SetProperty<T> method, OnPropertyChanged method, PropertyChanged event declaration, using System.ComponentModel, using System.Runtime.CompilerServices. Keep all properties using SetProperty() unchanged — they now call the inherited version.
patterns.exemplar_diff:
- implements INotifyPropertyChanged -> extends BindableBase
- remove SetProperty<T> method
- remove OnPropertyChanged method
- remove PropertyChanged event
- remove using System.ComponentModel
- remove using System.Runtime.CompilerServices

patterns.description: File with multiple classes (e.g., a ViewModel + inner item model), each with its own SetProperty<T>. Only the outer class should inherit BindableBase; inner classes keep their own if they have different notification behavior.
patterns.transformation: Same as single-class-direct-base for the primary ViewModel class. For inner/nested model classes that also have SetProperty: if the inner class implements INotifyPropertyChanged with the same pattern, also change it to inherit BindableBase. Remove duplicate methods from both.
patterns.exemplar_diff: Same as single-class-direct-base applied to each class in the file

patterns.description: ViewModel with void SetProperty<T> (no return value) instead of bool. Uses PropertyChanged?.Invoke directly instead of OnPropertyChanged helper.
patterns.transformation: Same as single-class-direct-base. The BindableBase.SetProperty returns bool, but callers using void return just ignore it — no call-site changes needed. Remove the void SetProperty method and the PropertyChanged event.
patterns.exemplar_diff: Same transformation — BindableBase.SetProperty returns bool but void callers are compatible

shared_dependencies.change: Create new abstract class BindableBase : INotifyPropertyChanged with protected bool SetProperty<T>(ref T field, T value, [CallerMemberName] string? propertyName = null) using EqualityComparer<T>.Default.Equals, protected void OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string? propertyName = null), and public event PropertyChangedEventHandler? PropertyChanged
